evidence.snippet:
#### Part Number: NG3 Series, NG2 Series
CentOS Linux 7 will reach end of life (EOL) on June 30, 2024. To maintain a supported Linux OS on the NG3 and NG2 products, Astronics AES will be transitioning from CentOS 7 to Rocky 9.
![pdf-icon](/images/default-source/siteimages/pdf-icon.png?sfvrsn=6e61aa58_4 "pdf-icon")  [Product Change Notice](/docs/default-source/ballard-technology/sil0071.pdf?sfvrsn=9fdaafa7_4)

evidence.snippet:
### Portable Avionics Interfaces for USB 2.0
#### Part Number: All UA1xxx and CP-UA1xxx models
Astronics Advanced Electronic Systems (AES) is announcing the transition of its first generation UA1000 family of Portable Avionics Interfaces for USB 2.0 products to the Legacy lifecycle. Includes all I/O configurations and option suffixes (FTO, FXY, NE, M1, M2).

tagline: Modular power generation, distribution, and conversion systems for airframe and MEA/eVTOL platforms, plus avionics data gateway (Aircraft Interface Devices). Production-ready CorePower® family serves UAV and traditional aircraft. NDAA compliance and Blue UAS certification status unknown; limited public evidence on unmanned-specific deployment or defense contracts.
